summary: Representative PR #60325 is closed and should remain historical evidence. The best live canonical for the read-alias diagnostic family is open issue #56694. The display-layer issue #54882 and detailed diagnostic issue #60008 are related but not safe to close in this pass, and open PR #55121 needs maintainer judgment because it is a useful editable mixed-surface PR with failing checks while current main appears to have moved toward a canonical path-only contract. No close/comment/label mutations are planned.
